2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.0.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

0082.issue: [S0082] Package "@eslint/js" (devDependencies) can be updated from 9.34.0 to 10.0.1. The newer version has been published for 109 days. Please evaluate updating [package.json](https://github.com/DpunktS/ioBroker.seplos-v3-sniffer/blob/master/package.json).
